executives.name: Peter Beck
executives.background: Mr. Beck is the founder of Rocket Lab and has served as the President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board of Directors since June 2013. Mr. Beck has also served as the Chief Engineer since January 2021. From 2013 to 2019, Mr. Beck also served as the Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer. Since founding the company in 2006, Mr. Beck has grown Rocket Lab into a global organization that develops and launches advanced rocket technology and space systems.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Chairman of the Board

executives.name: Adam Spice
executives.background: Mr. Spice has served as the Chief Financial Officer since May 2018. From January 2011 to May 2018, Mr. Spice served as Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at MaxLinear, Inc., a provider of radio frequency, analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. From October 2009 to November 2010, Mr. Spice was the Chief Financial Officer of SiTime Corporation, a MEMS-based semiconductor company.

executives.name: Shaun O’Donnell
executives.background: Mr. O’Donnell has served as the Chief Operating Officer since October 2017. Prior to that, he served as the Vice President of New Zealand Operations from June 2013 to October 2017. Before joining Rocket Lab, Mr. O’Donnell held various leadership roles in the telecommunications and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Beck
board_of_directors.background: Founder of Rocket Lab and has served as President, CEO and Chairman since 2013.

board_of_directors.name: David Falstrup
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Falstrup has served as a member of the Board since 2014. He is a seasoned executive with extensive experience in the aerospace and defense industries, having held senior leadership positions at several major aerospace companies.

board_of_directors.name: Sven Ennerfelt
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ennerfelt has served as a member of the Board since 2013. He was previously the President and CEO of Axel Johnson AB, a large Swedish family-owned business group.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Griffin
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Griffin has served as a member of the Board since 2020. He previously served as the Under Secretary of Defense for Research and Engineering and was the Administrator of NASA from 2005 to 2009.

board_of_directors.name: Merline Saintil
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Saintil has served as a member of the Board since 2021. She is an experienced technology executive and board member, having held leadership roles at Intuit, Yahoo!, and PayPal.

board_of_directors.name: Jon McNeill
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McNeill has served as a member of the Board since 2021. He is the CEO and co-founder of DVx Ventures and previously served as the COO of Lyft and President of Global Sales, Delivery and Service at Tesla.
